Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP to pull live inventory data for each matched part number, confirming what DFC currently stocks and flagging gaps where no inventory exists for the vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a real-time inventory snapshot tied to the specific vehicle, so the output reflects actual stock availability rather than outdated catalog data.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures and formats the combined catalog and inventory data into a clean, readable Excel-ready layout — organizing stocked parts, gaps, and relevant vehicle metadata into clearly labeled columns.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Transforms raw data from two systems into a polished, professional output without any manual formatting work, saving significant preparation time per request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, including a brief summary of what was found, how many parts are stocked, and how many gaps were identified.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of his form submission, replacing a process that previously required back-and-forth requests and manual file preparation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries Dream for live inventory data on every part number in the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort and ensuring every status is consistent and current.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report spreadsheet with the live Dream inventory data, appending status columns to each row and flagging any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — marking them as dead ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Turns a static backorder list into a dynamic, actionable report that immediately tells the team which orders can be fulfilled and which require escalation or customer communication.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder lines — notifying customers of delays, providing expected dates where available, and escalating dead-end parts with no source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Proactively manages customer expectations at scale without requiring staff to write individual emails, reducing inbound status calls and improving the customer experience during supply delays.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all available two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes rather than the days it would take to manually compile data from three separate manufacturer catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which two-piece rotor applications DFC currently covers and which represent gaps or new product opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC has competitive coverage and where there are market gaps, giving the product team a data-driven basis for sourcing and catalog expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about their demand for specific two-piece rotor applications where gaps were identified, collecting real-world demand signals.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers demand data directly from customers at scale without requiring sales reps to make individual calls, prioritizing which catalog gaps are worth filling based on actual market interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, gap flags, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, consolidated reference to make informed catalog and sourcing decisions, eliminating the need to manually reconcile data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy fields — including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — into a structured dataset for phrase scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of live ad copy across both platforms in one automated pull, ensuring no active ad is missed during the compliance or quality scan.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field against a defined list of target phrases, flags exact matches, and records the specific ad ID, field name, and matched copy string for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Completes a phrase audit across hundreds of ads in seconds with zero false negatives, replacing a time-consuming manual review process and ensuring nothing slips through.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field, matched phrase, and full copy context — organized by platform and sorted by match type.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, ready-to-act investigation report directly to the requester on demand, enabling fast compliance response or copy corrections without any manual digging.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 28 of 55 total agents completed, 9 currently in progress, and 18 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, keeping the overall count steady across all categories. The team continues to build on a solid foundation of live, running automations while active development work moves forward on the 9 in-progress agents. Great momentum across the board — more updates to come as in-progress builds near the finish line!
